title: CustomCommandPrefix
description: Add a new prefix for your commands in addition to the typical slash.
body:
Welcome to CustomCommandPrefix.

All this plugin does is add a new command prefix in addition to the `/`.

Why would you ever need this?

It's more designed for Geyser servers who have `xbox-achievements-enabled` enabled. This prevents the user from sending any messages with a `/` in the front.

Configuration:

One (working) config option at the moment: `prefix`. Set this to whatever you want!

This plugin is fairly niche but is useful if you need it.
